Off Calendar Aug-09-2006 Continued To Oct-18-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: APPEARENCES BY THOMAS W. LATHAM, ATTY. FOR PETITIONER, ROBERT OKAMOTO, PETITONER
PETITION NOT COMPLETE. SPECIAL LETTERS ISSUED.
JUDGE:JOHN DEARMAN; CLERK:LARRISA DOTSON; RPTR:CJRISTINA PAXTON

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petiton For Probate Of Will And For Letters Testamentary
Off Calendar Jul-19-2006 Continued To Aug-09-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petiton For Probate Of Will And For Letters Testamentary
Off Calendar Jun-07-2006 Continued To Jul-19-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Case consolidated with 288591. Thomas Latham appearing for and with Robert Okamoto. Jesse Ralph appearing for and with Helen Okamoto. Mr. Latham stated that this matter should be continued. There is no immediate need for appointment since there is no probate assets. Mr. Ralph objects to Mr. Latham's standing since he has not filed a Substitution of attorneys. Mr. Latham have the original substitution of attorneys and he will file it this morning. Court is continuing this matter to 7/19. Mr. Ralph states his objections. He agrees to Mr. Okamoto having general powers with bond. Bond issue addressed. Court wants to set a status on the bond on 6/14. Parties ask for a recess to discuss the bond issue.
At 10:11am, All parties return to court. The special administrator has obtained a bond for $10,000.00. Special Letters will expire on 7/19. Mr. Latham to prepare an order. Next week's hearing is off calendar. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Lois Baty.
